My goal with _____ is to create the ultimate ENFP character.

“No!  Please!  Call me ____.  Mr. ____ is my son!”

Someone gives a long winded entreaty, ending with, “And if you do this I’ll give you a lot of money.”  _____ holds out his palm and says, “Say no more, my good man—you had me at ‘*money*’.”

In the third book: “Before anything else is destroyed, can someone, anyone, *please* get me a martini?”
